title: After the Debut: The Lingering Scent of Turf

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has survived her debut race. Even after
crossing the finish line, her excitement shows no
signs of dying down, and her heart races wildly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pounding in Ines Fujin's chest takes her back
to a moment in which she felt profoundly inspired
by the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminded of that time, she sets her sights on
winning the Japanese Derby herself. She knows it
might seem like a rash decision, but Ines Fujin
wants what she wants!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare ourselves for this bold goal, we
decide to take on a G1 race that's host to a
gathering of fierce junior-year racers. It's
settled—our next goal is the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes!
